patch.value: Improve update-command close and audit-owner failure guidance from telemetry

Persisted telemetry shows update is a high-usage, high-failure command path, with repeated close-through-update attempts and audit ownership restrictions. Improve remediation guidance and/or safe workflow affordances so users can recover faster.
Update-command failures for close-through-update and audit ownership restrictions produce clearer actionable remediation, with regression tests and updated help/docs where applicable.

value.author: cursor-agent
value.text: Duplicate-check evidence: pm search update status closed close command telemetry failure audit ownership --limit 10 found only closed close-workflow implementation/history items and no active data-derived update UX remediation item. Telemetry evidence: update had 386 finishes, 105 failures, 27.2 percent failure rate; top patterns included invalid --status closed and audit ownership restriction errors.
